howItWorks.intro: This iran oil sanctions and your gas price calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly impact = gallons used × price change
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much do Iran sanctions affect gas prices?
faq.answer: Maximum pressure sanctions remove about 1.5 million barrels per day from global markets, which translates to roughly $0.15-0.25/gallon at the pump. Lifting sanctions and allowing full Iranian exports would add similar supply and reduce prices by a comparable amount.
